р“ҸІвӢҶ ЦҙЦ¶Цё а№Ӣр“Ӯғ вӢҶ "why does the bot keep speaking for me?"

вң® im so sorry yall experience this babes cause tbh its a battle for me as well. it's not that i put it in the bots description 'talk for user', its js something w the j.ai LLM which will hopefully be fixed in the future. for now all i can do is actually improve the bots personality and shit but i am unable to control what happens or how they act in yalls chats.

р“ҸІвӢҶ ЦҙЦ¶Цё а№Ӣр“Ӯғ вӢҶ "why does it keep misgendering me?"
